text: Welcome to the community, helper_alex! You've been approved as a moderator. We're excited to have you on the team — please review the mod guidelines in #rules and don't hesitate to reach out if you have questions.
Hey guide_sam, welcome aboard! You've been approved as an event helper. Check out #events for upcoming opportunities and say hi in #general when you're ready!
Welcome newbie_kim! You're now a member of the community. Feel free to introduce yourself in #general and explore the channels. Glad to have you here!
Welcome mentor_lina! You've been approved as a community mentor. Your experience is valued — check out #mentorship for guidelines and available mentees. Looking forward to working with you!
